quote_en: The beginning is the most important part of the work.
A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
We are what we repeatedly do.
Action is the foundational key to all success.

quote_kr: 잘 말하는 것보다 잘하는 것이 낫다.
quote_en: Well done is better than well said.

quote_kr: 시계는 보지 말고 시계처럼 행동하라. 계속 가라.
quote_en: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
Nothing will work unless you do.

quote_kr: 성공은 매일 반복되는 작은 노력의 합이다.
quote_en: Success is the sum of small efforts repeated day in and day out.
The time for action is now.
Chance favors the prepared mind.
Great things are done by a series of small things brought together.

quote_kr: 시작하지 않으면 아무것도 이룰 수 없다.
quote_en: You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.
Action expresses priorities.
Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.
Energy and persistence conquer all things.

quote_kr: 할 수 있다고 믿으면 이미 절반은 이룬 것이다.
quote_en: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
The best way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
Failure is simply the opportunity to begin again.

quote_kr: 오늘 할 수 있는 일을 내일로 미루지 마라.
quote_en: Never leave that till tomorrow which you can do today.
Vision without execution is just hallucination.
We learn by doing and by repeating.

quote_kr: 행동은 말보다 더 큰 힘을 가진다.
quote_en: Actions speak louder than words.
Effort only fully releases its reward after a person refuses to quit.
Success is where preparation and opportunity meet.
The way to get started is to begin doing.
Seize the day.
Little things make big days.
Knowing is not enough; we must apply.
Perseverance is the hard work you do after you get tired of doing the hard work you already did.
Without action, nothing changes.
Failure is success in progress.
Now is the only time you have.
You get what you work for, not what you wish for.
Habits are formed by repetition.
The choices you make today shape your tomorrow.
You cannot control what happens to you, but you can control your attitude toward what happens to you.
Great things have small beginnings.
An ounce of practice is worth more than tons of preaching.
Do it now. Sometimes later becomes never.
Change begins with action.

quote_kr: 행동 없는 지식은 아무 의미가 없다.
quote_en: Knowing is not enough; we must apply.
Where there is a will, there is a way.

quote_kr: 오늘 할 수 있는 일을 내일로 미루지 마라.
quote_en: Never leave that till tomorrow which you can do today.

quote_kr: 위대한 일은 작은 일의 반복에서 나온다.
quote_en: Great things are done by a series of small things brought together.

quote_kr: 할 수 있다고 믿으면 이미 절반은 이룬 것이다.
quote_en: Believe you can and you're halfway there.

quote_kr: 성공은 최종이 아니고 실패는 치명적이지 않다.
quote_en: Success is not final, failure is not fatal.
The time for action is now.
Chance favors the prepared mind.
Genius is one percent inspiration and ninety-nine percent perspiration.
Effort only fully releases its reward after a person refuses to quit.
Action expresses priorities.
Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.

quote_kr: 배우는 가장 좋은 방법은 행동하는 것이다.
quote_en: The best way to learn is to do.
Energy and persistence conquer all things.
Failure is simply the opportunity to begin again.
Nothing will work unless you do.

quote_kr: 시계는 보지 말고 시계처럼 행동하라. 계속 가라.
quote_en: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.

quote_kr: 잘하는 것이 잘 말하는 것보다 낫다.
quote_en: Well done is better than well said.
Vision without execution is just hallucination.
Great things have small beginnings.

quote_kr: 말은 느리게 하고 행동은 빠르게 하라.
quote_en: Be slow to speak, but swift to act.

quote_kr: 배우고 때때로 익히면 또한 기쁘지 아니한가.
quote_en: Is it not a pleasure to learn and practice what is learned?

quote_kr: 아는 것을 안다고 하고 모르는 것을 모른다고 하는 것이 참된 앎이다.
quote_en: To know what you know and what you do not know, that is true knowledge.

quote_kr: 천하의 어려운 일도 반드시 쉬운 데서 시작된다.
quote_en: Difficult things of the world must have their beginnings in the easy.

quote_kr: 큰 일도 반드시 작은 일에서 시작된다.
quote_en: Great things are accomplished by a series of small things.

quote_kr: 남을 아는 자는 지혜롭고, 자신을 아는 자는 밝다.
quote_en: He who knows others is wise; he who knows himself is enlightened.

quote_kr: 이기는 자는 싸우기 전에 이기고, 지는 자는 싸운 후에 이기려 한다.
quote_en: The victorious strategist wins before the battle.
If you know the enemy and know yourself, you need not fear the result of a hundred battles.
Heaven helps those who help themselves.

quote_kr: 배우고도 생각하지 않으면 얻는 것이 없고, 생각하고도 배우지 않으면 위태롭다.
quote_en: Learning without thought is labor lost; thought without learning is perilous.

quote_kr: 죽고자 하면 살고, 살고자 하면 죽는다.
quote_en: He who seeks to live shall die, and he who seeks to die shall live.
Learning never exhausts the mind.
Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.
Action is the difference between intention and results.

quote_kr: 미래를 예측하는 가장 좋은 방법은 그것을 만드는 것이다.
quote_en: The best way to predict the future is to create it.
The present moment is the only time over which we have dominion.

quote_kr: 우리가 할 수 있는 일을 지금 해야 한다.
quote_en: Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.

quote_kr: 작은 일에 충실하라. 거기에 힘이 있다.
quote_en: Be faithful in small things because it is in them that your strength lies.

quote_kr: 말보다 행동이 더 큰 힘을 가진다.
quote_en: Actions speak louder than words.
Well begun is half done.
Actions produce results.
Small changes make a big difference.
The present moment is all you have.
Nothing happens without action.
Carpe diem.
Practice makes perfect.
Believe you can.
Start now.
Persistence is power.
Action conquers fear.
Tomorrow never comes.
Start small.
Action creates the path.
Keep going.
Results come from action.
Today is the earliest day.
Simplicity is strength.
Action changes everything.
Stay hungry, stay foolish.

quote_kr: 위대한 일은 사랑하는 일을 할 때만 가능하다.
quote_en: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
Your time is limited.

quote_kr: 가장 큰 위험은 아무 위험도 감수하지 않는 것이다.
quote_en: The biggest risk is not taking any risk.
Move fast and break things.

quote_kr: 무언가 충분히 중요하다면, 확률이 낮아도 해야 한다.
quote_en: When something is important enough, you do it even if the odds are not in your favor.
Don't give up.
Failure is an option here.
Think from first principles.
The most important thing is to get started.
Ideas are easy. Execution is everything.
Done is better than perfect.

quote_kr: 무언가를 시작하는 가장 좋은 방법은 시작하는 것이다.
quote_en: The best way to get started is to begin.
Obsess over customers.
Start small and grow fast.
Experiment constantly.
Fail fast.
Focus is saying no.
Get a little better every day.
Habits are the compound interest of self-improvement.
